items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario where the offboarding checklist triggers access revocation. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the implementation or functionality of this specific scenario within the saga lifecycle. The linked use cases and prior steps do not address this requirement, leading to an inconclusive status regarding the validation of this exploratory step.
